metadata.policy: Do not present quarantined items as verified claims.

items.label: Attribution quality certainty
items.reason: Approved attribution-chain evidence is not present in this dashboard repair package.
items.next_action: Validate through approved analytics and attribution evidence.

items.label: Revenue or ROI certainty
items.reason: No approved revenue or ROI proof was requested or provided for this repair.
items.blocked_claim: Revenue, ROI, pipeline, SQL, or deal certainty claim
items.next_action: Keep values hidden or explicitly unverified until evidence is approved.

items.label: Public or client-facing release
items.reason: Founder approval and SA-04 QA proof are required.
items.next_action: Complete proof-pack validation before any external approval request.

items.label: HubSpot or CRM write
items.reason: The repair is GitHub contents-only and does not include CRM writes.
